news.title:
IDBI Bank's disinvestment process is confidential; rumors on scrapping sale cannot be confirmed.
Disinvestment will follow competitive bidding; bank will update exchanges on govt's material info.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank's disinvestment process is confidential; rumors on scrapping sale cannot be confirmed.
Disinvestment will follow competitive bidding; bank will update exchanges on govt's material info.

news.title:
IDBI Bank privatisation process has been called off after 5 years, as per sources.
The update was reported by CNBC TV18, highlighting the decision's significance.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank privatisation process has been called off after 5 years, as per sources.
The update was reported by CNBC TV18, highlighting the decision's significance.

news.title:
IDBI Bank drops 11.5% as government may scrap majority stake sale bids.
Stock at ₹80.10, marking its largest single-day fall since June 2024.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank drops 11.5% as government may scrap majority stake sale bids.
Stock at ₹80.10, marking its largest single-day fall since June 2024.

news.title:
ITI Ltd surged 197.4x in volume to 668.36 lakh shares, rising Rs.10.15 to Rs.266.90. MRPL's volume rose 4.9x to 789.03 lakh shares, gaining Rs.12.58.
Pfizer's volume increased 6.1x, rising Rs.1.31 to Rs.4683.50. IDBI Bank's volume rose 5.5x but fell Rs.16.58. Thermax gained Rs.0.88 with a 5x volume surge.
news.summary:
ITI Ltd surged 197.4x in volume to 668.36 lakh shares, rising Rs.10.15 to Rs.266.90. MRPL's volume rose 4.9x to 789.03 lakh shares, gaining Rs.12.58.
Pfizer's volume increased 6.1x, rising Rs.1.31 to Rs.4683.50. IDBI Bank's volume rose 5.5x but fell Rs.16.58. Thermax gained Rs.0.88 with a 5x volume surge.

news.title:
IDBI Bank states no communication from govt on scrapping disinvestment bidding.
IDBI Bank confirms no updates received on strategic disinvestment process.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank states no communication from govt on scrapping disinvestment bidding.
IDBI Bank confirms no updates received on strategic disinvestment process.

news.title: IDBI Bank's disinvestment faces setbacks as bids fall below reserve price.
news.summary: IDBI Bank's disinvestment faces setbacks as bids fall below reserve price.

news.title:
Govt may scrap IDBI Bank stake sale after low bids below expectations, halting privatisation efforts.
Planned 61% stake sale valued at $6.5B faces investor concerns over valuation, financial health, and market conditions.
news.summary:
Govt may scrap IDBI Bank stake sale after low bids below expectations, halting privatisation efforts.
Planned 61% stake sale valued at $6.5B faces investor concerns over valuation, financial health, and market conditions.

news.title: India plans to scrap bids for a majority stake in IDBI Bank, as per reports.
news.summary: India plans to scrap bids for a majority stake in IDBI Bank, as per reports.

news.title:
Government reconsiders IDBI Bank divestment due to West Asia conflict.
Fairfax Financial and Emirates NDB submit bids for a stake in IDBI Bank.
news.summary:
Government reconsiders IDBI Bank divestment due to West Asia conflict.
Fairfax Financial and Emirates NDB submit bids for a stake in IDBI Bank.

news.title:
IDBI Bank plans to complete its privatization by FY27.
This move targets improved operational efficiency and growth opportunities.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank plans to complete its privatization by FY27.
This move targets improved operational efficiency and growth opportunities.

news.title:
Fairfax reportedly leads the bid to acquire a stake in IDBI Bank.
This indicates strong interest in the financial sector.
news.summary:
Fairfax reportedly leads the bid to acquire a stake in IDBI Bank.
This indicates strong interest in the financial sector.

news.title:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.
news.summary:
Bombay HC ruled RBI fraud rules violations aren't open to court scrutiny.
HC lifted stay on three banks classifying Anil Ambani's accounts as fraud.

news.title:
Finance Minister to evaluate IDBI Bank's progress today.
This review may signal potential developments in the bank's strategy.
news.summary:
Finance Minister to evaluate IDBI Bank's progress today.
This review may signal potential developments in the bank's strategy.

news.title: RBI meeting discussed IDBI Bank's divestment, signaling ownership changes.
news.summary: RBI meeting discussed IDBI Bank's divestment, signaling ownership changes.

news.title:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.
news.summary:
Bombay HC lifts stay, allowing Bank of Baroda, Indian Overseas Bank, and IDBI Bank to tag Anil Ambani as fraud borrower.
Ambani assures cooperation with ED/CBI probes, commits to not leaving India without SC authorization.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
IDBI Bank approves transferring its Demat business to subsidiary ICMS, including NSDL and CDSL IDs.
The transfer, a related party transaction at arm's length, is valued at ₹5.5 crore over one year.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank approves transferring its Demat business to subsidiary ICMS, including NSDL and CDSL IDs.
The transfer, a related party transaction at arm's length, is valued at ₹5.5 crore over one year.

news.title:
IDBI Bank Ltd announces a strike notice on Feb 12, 2026 by AIBEA, AIBOA, and BEFI.
Notice issued under SEBI Regulation 30 & 51, highlighting employee demands.
news.summary:
IDBI Bank Ltd announces a strike notice on Feb 12, 2026 by AIBEA, AIBOA, and BEFI.

news.title:
IDBI Bank saw exceptional trading volume on 10 Feb 2026, signaling high investor interest.
The stock outperformed sector peers and broader indices, showing renewed momentum.
